sql: SELECT o.id, o.name, o.status, u.name as user_name FROM orders o JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.status IN (#{orderStatuses}) AND o.user_id IN (#{userIds}) AND u.department_id IN (#{deptIds})
templateSql:
SELECT o.id, o.name, o.status, u.name as user_name
FROM orders o
JOIN users u ON o.user_id = u.id
<where>
    <if test="orderStatuses != null and orderStatuses.size() > 0">
        AND o.status IN
        <foreach collection="orderStatuses" item="os" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{os}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="userIds != null and userIds.size() > 0">
        AND o.user_id IN
        <foreach collection="userIds" item="uid" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{uid}
        </foreach>
    </if>
    <if test="deptIds != null and deptIds.size() > 0">
        AND u.department_id IN
        <foreach collection="deptIds" item="did" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{did}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
